summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without a shared canonical. No security-sensitive refs were present, instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, and merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by job frontmatter, so all open PRs remain non-mutating classifications.

actions.reason: Independent useful PR; keep open for normal review because closeout, merge, and fix actions are not allowed in this job.
Independent docs PR with failed proof and required author/rebase follow-up; keep open because this job cannot apply low-signal closeout or technical fixes.
Related linked issue should remain open while #80666 is reviewed; no close action is allowed or appropriate before a landed fix.
Independent focused bug-fix PR with active linked issue and review follow-up; keep open for normal maintainer/review process because merge and fix are not allowed.
Independent broad focused bug-fix PR; keep open because technical review/merge decisions are outside this inventory job.
Independent docs PR with failed proof and review feedback; keep open because closeout is disabled and product/docs judgment remains in the normal PR path.
